theme.title: Mixed / Stock-Picker's Market
theme.summary: Energy (+0.88%) and Industrials (+0.56%) led the market today, while Communication Svcs (-1.16%) and Financials (-0.52%) brought up the rear. Performance didn't cluster cleanly by style — growth averaged -0.47%, defensives -0.10%, and value/cyclicals +0.15% — more a stock-by-stock market than a single broad theme. Major indices moved in a tighter band — S&P 500 -0.64%, Dow -0.34%, Nasdaq -1.03% — without one clearly dominating. Small caps bucked the broader trend, with the Russell 2000 up -0.32%, outperforming large caps. The VIX rose 7.72% to 18.00, pointing to a bit more caution creeping in beneath the surface. Gold added 0.66% to $4,021.90, crude oil was little changed at $81.41, and bitcoin slipped 0.60% — cross-asset moves weren't all pointing the same direction as equities.
